engine_data_semantics.shipped_mask_issue: _real_bar_mask uses adj_close.notna, so carried-price halt rows are usually classified as tradeable
engine_data_semantics.unresolved_lot_price_issue: qfq prices are used for 100-share affordability and are not raw historical transaction prices
engine_data_semantics.unresolved_price_limit_issue: engine freezes both directions although up-limit should only block buys and down-limit should only block sells

metadata.contamination: C2-DIRECT: 2019-2026 history was inspected in prior batches
metadata.positive_result_limit: at most paper candidate; not deployable GO

protocol.e1: E0 plus existing partial_rebalance=True and fixed 0.5% per-name threshold
protocol.e2: E0 plus frozen monthly CSI300 close > MA200 exposure gate; risk-off cash
protocol.halt_semantics: run both shipped adj_close-not-null mask and evaluator sensitivity tradestatus==1 mask

regime.rule: monthly CSI300 close > trailing 200 trading-day simple moving average
regime.signal_timing: month-end close; target executes through engine at T+1 open
